name: io.github.redseb/rpgmaker-mz-mcp
description: MCP server for RPG Maker MZ: maps, tile painting, events, database editing, and validation.

environmentVariables.name: RPGMAKER_PROJECT_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Default RPG Maker MZ project directory (contains game.rmmzproject). Optional: the set_project tool can set or change the project at runtime.
